name: @zhushanwen/pi-ask-user
description: Inline adaptive ask_user tool — single/multi-question structured input with split-pane preview, inline editor, and optional comments.

name: @zhushanwen/pi-goal
description: Codex-style /goal command — persistent goal-driven autonomous loop with evidence-based completion, token/time budgets, blocked detection, and steering templates.

name: @zhushanwen/pi-todo
description: AI-driven todo list — stateful task management with session persistence and /todos command.

name: @zhushanwen/pi-pending-notifications
description: Cross-extension async operation registration/query mechanism — prevents message injection during long-running operations.

name: @zhushanwen/pi-subagent-workflow
description: Unified subagent execution and multi-agent workflow orchestration — spawned-process agent runtime with sync/background modes, stateful workflow management with persistence, state machine, and execution tracing.

name: @zhushanwen/pi-structured-output
description: Structured output tool — enforces JSON Schema via tool call mechanism with Ajv validation.
